title: tournefortia aurata
intro: Tournefortia aurata, also known as golden tournefortia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can provide health benefits such as reducing pain, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In addition to its medicinal uses, Tournefortia aurata has also been used in traditional medicine to treat fever, digestive issues, and other health conditions.
